examples: This classroom is where I learned to read and write.
They give the appearance of knowing what they're doing. It's this appearance that lets them get away with so much.

definitions.text: To the degree or extent indicated.
examples: Do we need this many recommendations?

definitions.text: The thing, item, etc. being indicated.
examples: This isn't the item that I ordered.

definitions.text: Something being indicated that is here; one of these.
Indicates the speaker's strong approval or agreement with the previous material.
examples: ― I wish trolls could be banned from the forum immediately, without any discussion.― This!
